name: Arc89SmartAsa

args.name: asset_id
args.desc: Smart ASA ID

args.name: total
args.desc: The total number of base units of the Smart ASA to create

args.name: decimals
args.desc: The number of digits to use after the decimal point when displaying the Smart ASA

args.name: default_frozen
args.desc: Smart ASA default frozen (True to freeze holdings by default)

args.name: unit_name
args.desc: The name of a unit of Smart ASA

args.name: name
args.desc: The name of the Smart ASA

args.name: url
args.desc: Smart ASA external URL

args.name: metadata_hash
args.desc: Smart ASA metadata hash

args.name: manager_addr
args.desc: Account that can manage the configuration of the Smart ASA and destroy it

args.name: reserve_addr
args.desc: Account that holds the reserve (non-minted) units of Smart ASA and can mint or burn it

args.name: freeze_addr
args.desc: Account that can freeze/unfreeze holdings of the Smart ASA globally or locally

args.name: clawback_addr
args.desc: Account that can clawback holdings of the Smart ASA

args.desc: Smart ASA ID

desc: Smart ASA (ARC-20) Reference Implementation, with ASA Metadata Registry (ARC-89) integration.

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Forbidden Close Out on Opt In
Invalid Metadata Hash length, must be 32 bytes
Invalid Total, must be >= circulating supply
Must call the ASA Metadata Registry
Must grant Controlled ASA RBAC to the Smart ASA
Must pay MBR to the ASA Metadata Registry
Wrong Close Out on Close Out
invalid number of bytes for arc4.bool
invalid number of bytes for arc4.dynamic_array<arc4.uint8>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint32
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
